useCases.pascalCase: Class names, React components, TypeScript types
useCases.kebabCase: URL slugs, CSS class names, HTML attributes

descriptions.aeoDefinition: Text Case Converter is a free online tool that converts text between camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE, and more. Instant conversion with real-time preview. No data leaves your browser.
descriptions.whatIsTitle: What is a Text Case Converter?
descriptions.whatIs: A text case converter transforms strings between naming conventions used in programming and writing. It detects the input format automatically and shows conversions to camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, CONSTANT_CASE, kebab-case, dot.case, lower case, UPPER CASE, Title Case, Sentence case, and path/case — all updated in real time as you type.
descriptions.useCasesP1: Rename variables when migrating code between languages — convert Python snake_case to JavaScript camelCase with one paste.
descriptions.useCasesP2: Generate consistent URL slugs, CSS class names, or environment variable names from plain English input.
descriptions.step1Text: Type or paste any string into the input field. The tool auto-detects the current case format.
descriptions.step2Text: All 11 case formats are displayed instantly in a table. The detected format is highlighted with a badge.
descriptions.step3Text: Click the copy button next to any converted string to copy it to your clipboard.
descriptions.faq1Q: Can I convert multiple strings at once?
descriptions.faq1A: Yes. Paste multiple lines and the tool converts each line independently. Multi-line conversion applies the selected case to every line.
descriptions.faq2A: Yes. The tool correctly handles Unicode characters including accented letters, CJK characters, and emojis in case conversions.
descriptions.faq3A: The converter supports 11 formats: camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, CONSTANT_CASE, kebab-case, dot.case, lower case, UPPER CASE, Title Case, Sentence case, and path/case.
